meta.description: JavaScript, Python and C# engineer with broad commercial software experience.

intro: I have 13 years of commercial experience in software engineering. I work in JavaScript, Python, and C#.
I have worked across frontend and UX design as well as backend development, database programming, and device communication.

As an independent contractor, I have successfully delivered and deployed solutions that improve small business operations. In recent years I have focused on frontend technologies, with a stack centered around React.
In my spare time, I do photojournalism and design and program IoT devices. I play in a percussion band and enjoy mountain hiking.
